brief_justification: Correct answer (Yes) with valid causal reasoning; Multi-level analysis tracing both mediation paths, intervention effects, and counterfactual implications; Explicitly suppresses biases (single-hypothesis commitment, correlation-causation leap) and monitors reasoning process; Applies counterfactual check and falsification test as verification; Acknowledges the assumption about positive effect direction but presents the default interpretation with moderate confidence rather than fully structured uncertainty; Systematically considers the alternative (negative effect of Pexu) and explains why it's rejected; Complete derivation from DAG structure through intervention analysis to conclusion, fully reproducible
